hooks.text: Your bank says the wire is sent. Your supplier says nothing arrived. Neither one is lying to you. Both are right at the same time.
Your money already left your bank, but it has not reached your supplier yet. There is a place in between where it just sits. Almost no business owner knows where.
A wire that says sent can sit untouched between banks for up to two working days before your supplier sees a single cent of it.
A business owner stares at the bank app saying sent. The supplier stares at an empty account saying nothing came. The money is real, just stuck between two banks neither of them can see.
While your bank says sent and your supplier says nothing, your order is frozen, your factory slot is slipping, and you have no idea where your own money is.
